articles.original_title: Lakers Sign Arthur Kaluma To Two-Way Contract, Waive Peter Suder
articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers announced that they have signed forward Arthur Kaluma to a two-way contract for the 2026-27 season, waiving guard Peter Suder to complete the transaction.
